name: test_should_datetime_into_date_time[localdatetime({year: 1984, week: 10, dayOfWeek: 3, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, millisecond: 645})-{datetime: other, timezone: '+05:00'}-'1984-03-07T12:31:14.645+05:00']

parameters.value: {'other': 'localdatetime({year: 1984, week: 10, dayOfWeek: 3, hour: 12, minute: 31, second: 14, millisecond: 645})', 'expression': "{datetime: other, timezone: '+05:00'}", 'result': "'1984-03-07T12:31:14.645+05:00'"}
